title: ShelterCensus
description: A single day's DHS shelter census — the daily count of people in the New York City shelter system, broken out by client population. Canonical schema reconciling the flagship 'DHS Daily Report' (k46n-sa2m, 13 columns) and its historical twin (dwrg-kzni), plus the 'Daily Report Of Single Adult And Family Intake' (sci4-yqgk). Keyed on the date of census. This is DHS's most-viewed Open Data asset.

totalIndividualsInShelter.description: 'Total Individuals in Shelter' — the headline system-wide count.

familiesWithChildrenInShelter.description: 'Families with Children in Shelter' (count of families).

adultsInFamiliesWithChildrenInShelter.description: 'Adults in Families with Children in Shelter'.

childrenInFamiliesWithChildrenInShelter.description: 'Children in Families with Children in Shelter'.

totalIndividualsInFamiliesWithChildrenIn.description: 'Total Individuals in Families with Children in Shelter'.
